=Index of values=

|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="(!!)"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.(!!) >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="(@@)"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.(@@) >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="(|>)"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.(|>) >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\A|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add"| value Ocsigen_cookie_map.Poly.add >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cookie_map.Poly >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add"| value Ocsigen_cookie_map.add >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cookie_map >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add ~~path c v m>> adds the cookie <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|c>> to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|m>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add_end_slash_if_missing"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.add_end_slash_if_missing >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="add_multi"| value Ocsigen_cookie_map.add_multi >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cookie_map >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|add~_multi new old>> adds the cookies from <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|new>> to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|old>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="advert"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.advert >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="assoc_remove"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.assoc_remove >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\B|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="basic_sep"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.basic_sep >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Cuts a string to the next separator
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="bind"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Option.bind >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Option >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\C|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="change_empty_list"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.change_empty_list >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="chop"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.chop >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="clear"| value Polytables.clear >> ~[<<a_api | module Polytables >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|clear t>> remove all data from t
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="comp"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.comp >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="create"| value Polytables.create >> ~[<<a_api | module Polytables >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|creates a new table
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="create"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.create >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="curry"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.curry >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\D|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="debug"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.debug >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\E|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="empty"| value Ocsigen_cookie_map.empty >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cookie_map >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\F|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="first_diff"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.first_diff >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|first~_diff s~1 s~2 n last>> returns the index of the first difference
     between s~1 and s~2~, starting from n and ending at last~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="fold_left"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.fold_left >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Infinite fold on circular lists ~(use with care!~)
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="from_poly"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.from_poly >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="fst"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Tuple3.fst >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Tuple3 >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\G|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="get"| value Polytables.get >> ~[<<a_api | module Polytables >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|get t k>> returns the current binding of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|k>> in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|t>> or raises <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Not~_found>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="get"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Option.get >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Option >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="get'"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Option.get' >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Option >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\I|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="id"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.id >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="in_list"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.in_list >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="insert"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.insert >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="is_empty"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.is_empty >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="is_prefix"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.is_prefix >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="is_prefix_skip_end_slash"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.is_prefix_skip_end_slash >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|is~_prefix~_skip~_end~_slash path~1 path~2>> returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|true>> if <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|path~1>> is the same
      as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|path~2>> before a first slash
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="iter"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.iter >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Infinite iteration on circular lists
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="iter"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Option.iter >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Option >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\J|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="join_path"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.join_path >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\L|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="last"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.last >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\M|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="make"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.make >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="make_absolute_url"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.make_absolute_url >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make~_absolute~_url https host port path>> generates a new absolute url
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="make_key"| value Polytables.make_key >> ~[<<a_api | module Polytables >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|create a new key for each data you want to save
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="map"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Option.map >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Option >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="map_filter"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.map_filter >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="may_append"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.may_append >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="may_concat"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.may_concat >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\R|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove"| value Polytables.remove >> ~[<<a_api | module Polytables >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove t k>> remove the current binding of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|k>> in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|t>> if it exists
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.remove >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove"| value Ocsigen_cookie_map.Poly.remove >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cookie_map.Poly >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove"| value Ocsigen_cookie_map.remove >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_cookie_map >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove c cookie~_table>> removes the cookie <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|c>> from <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|m>>~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_all"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_all >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_all_assoc"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_all_assoc >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_all_assoc_q"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_all_assoc_q >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_all_q"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_all_q >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_dotdot"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.remove_dotdot >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_dotdot path>> cleans the path of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~.~.>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_end_slash"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.remove_end_slash >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_end~_slash str>> removes last <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~/>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_first"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_first >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_first_if_any"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_first_if_any >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_first_if_any_q"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_first_if_any_q >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_first_q"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.remove_first_q >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_internal_slash"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.remove_internal_slash >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_internal~_slash path>> cleans the path of empty string
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_slash_at_beginning"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.remove_slash_at_beginning >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_slash_at_end"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.remove_slash_at_end >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="remove_spaces"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.remove_spaces >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|remove~_spaces s beg endd>> returns a copy of the string from beg to endd~,
      removing spaces at the beginning and at the end
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="return"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Option.return >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Option >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\S|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="sep"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.sep >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Cuts a string to the next separator~, removing spaces~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="set"| value Polytables.set >> ~[<<a_api | module Polytables >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set t k v>> associates <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|v>> to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|k>> in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|t>>
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="snd"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Tuple3.snd >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Tuple3 >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="split"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.split >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Splits a string for words with separator~,
      removing spaces~.
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="split_at"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.List.split_at >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.List >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="split_fragment"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base.split_fragment >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Url_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|split~_fragment str>> splits <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|str>> at first ~'~#~'
>>
|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="starts_with"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base.starts_with >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.String_base >>~]|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Same as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Stdlib~.~String~.starts~_with>>~.
>>
|
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\T|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="thd"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Tuple3.thd >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Tuple3 >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="to_list"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Option.to_list >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Option >>~]||
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="to_poly"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.to_poly >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\U|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="uncurry"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.uncurry >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base >>~]||
|@@ @style="tet-align: left;"@@\\V|
|@@class="odocwiki_index"@ @@<<a_api text="value"| value Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist.value >> ~[<<a_api | module Ocsigen_lib_base.Clist >>~]||
\\
